title: Prohibiting the distribution of Chinese Communist Party-controlled publications within House facilities, and for other purposes.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
crs_summary: This resolution prohibits the Office of the Chief Administrative Officer of the House of Representatives from accepting, distributing, or delivering Chinese Communist Party-controlled publications (e.g., China Daily).
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
